text:
FINDINGS:
Heterogeneously dense breast tissue. A 9 mm irregular mass at the left upper quadrant.

IMPRESSION:
Suspicious mass. BI-RADS category 4.

RECOMMENDATION:
Ultrasound-guided core biopsy is advised.
